description: Comprehensive overnight development: implement missing core features, polish UI, fix all bugs, and make the app production-ready.

userStories.title: Provider Service Listings — Publish & Browse Services
userStories.description: Provider can create service listings (like product cards) that Clients can browse. Each listing has: service category, title, description, photos, hourly/fixed rate, availability. Clients see these in the Provider Directory and can hire directly from a listing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ServiceListing model (Freezed): id, providerId, providerName, categoryId, title, description, photoUrls, hourlyRate, fixedRate, availability, neighbourhood, createdAt, isActive
Create Firestore collection 'service_listings' with security rules
Create create_service_screen.dart — form to create/edit a service listing
Create service_detail_screen.dart — full view with Hire button
Create service_card.dart — card widget for grids/lists
Add 'My Services' section to ProviderHomeScreen with Add button
In ProviderDirectoryScreen show service listings (or add Services tab)
Add routes: /services/create, /services/:listingId
Hire button creates direct-hire task pre-filled with provider + category + rate
flutter analyze 0 errors
Write and run integration test: provider creates listing, client browses and hires

Tasks search: client-side filter where title or description contains query
Providers search: filter by displayName, headline, or serviceCategories
Show results in same list format
Clear button, empty state, debounce 300ms
